answers: Start piano: learn finger placement, basic scales (C major), and simple songs. Practice 20-30 minutes daily for progress.
Keyboard vs piano: keyboard is cheaper and portable, piano has weighted keys and better touch response. Start with keyboard.
Piano tips: learn to read sheet music, practice with a metronome, master hands separately before combining.
Piano bajano shekha: C major scale diye shuru koro, daily practice koro, YouTube tutorials follow koro, ar patient thako.
